control.description-key: LeanToolKit settings composer — pick a card type (or load an existing settingsJSON to edit), fill in common, theme and card-specific configuration with typed fields, and emit a complete settingsJSON (stamped with cardType) ready to store against the card row.

property.name: inputJSON
property.description-key: An existing settingsJSON to edit (edit mode). Empty = compose a new one from scratch. Unrecognised keys are preserved on output.

property.name: cardType
property.description-key: Optional: preselect AND lock the card type (the control name, e.g. SqdpcCard) — use when editing a known card row. Empty = the maker picks.

property.name: resetTrigger
property.description-key: Reloads the control from Input JSON whenever this value CHANGES (e.g. Set(varReset, Text(Now()))).

property.name: outputJSON
property.description-key: The composed settingsJSON for the selected card — sparse (only values the maker set), stamped with cardType, unknown input keys preserved. Bind this to a live card settingsJSON input for a live preview; persist it in OnChange.

property.name: selectedCardType
property.description-key: The chosen card type (control name), also stamped inside Output JSON — bind to the card row type column.

property.name: cardTitle
property.description-key: Optional title bar for this form (for example, Card settings). Leave empty for no chrome at all.

property.name: prompts
property.description-key: Optional coaching prompts: plain text, or JSON array of strings / {field, hint} objects. Shown as an info popover.

property.name: backgroundColor
property.description-key: Background colour (any CSS colour or hex). Default white.

property.name: foregroundColor
property.description-key: Text / line colour. Default rich black.

property.name: accentColor
property.description-key: Accent colour for focus and highlights. Default rich black.

property.name: legendColors
property.description-key: Unused by this control; present for surface consistency.

property.name: fontFamily
property.description-key: Font family (or comma-separated font stack) for all text.

property.name: readOnly
property.description-key: When true, the form is view-only (fields disabled).
